title: CIEmetaDB
description: Data model for the CIE metadatabase: an aggregate store of CIEmetaDigitalProduct (DataCite-based) metadata entries with per-entry change history, audit trail, CIE-division domains and optimistic-concurrency anchors. The payload of each entry validates against CIEmetaDigitalProduct_schema_04.json.

domain.description: A CIE activity domain (typically a CIE Division).

code.description: Short code, e.g. D1, D2, D8.

historyRecord.description: One committed revision of an entry. patch is the forward RFC-6902 diff from the previous revision (rev 1 diffs from the empty document {}), so any revision N can be reconstructed by replaying patches 1..N onto {}.

comment.description: Change comment supplied by the editor.

baseHash.description: sha256 of the payload BEFORE this patch was applied (null for rev 1).

entryId.description: Internal stable identity, independent of the DOI. Used to match entries across DB files during merge.

rev.description: Revision counter, incremented on every committed change. Length of history equals rev.

contentHash.description: sha256 of the canonical (stable-key-order) JSON of payload at this revision. Used for concurrency/merge conflict detection.

idProposed.description: true when the DOI was generated locally and not yet assigned by CIE CB.

domains.description: Zero or more domain codes referencing db.domains[].code.

payload.description: The CIEmetaDigitalProduct metadata record. Validates against CIEmetaDigitalProduct_schema_04.json.

history.description: Append-only, oldest to newest. history[i].rev == i+1.

validationLog.description: Append-only log of CSV validation runs the editor chose to record (date, editor, file, computed hashes, per-check results). Independent of history.

fileName.description: Name of the CSV file that was validated.

passed.description: true when no check failed (warnings do not fail).

check.description: Check key, e.g. md5, sha256, fileName, numberOfRows, sumOfColumns, sampleRow.

dbId.description: Stable identity of this metadatabase instance.

baseHash.description: sha256 over the ordered list of entry contentHashes at export time. Concurrency anchor: an importing app compares this to detect divergence.

domains.description: The editable catalogue of CIE activity domains (Divisions) selectable per entry.

defaults.description: Editable default values (one per field) used to pre-fill auto-filled fields on new entries and available via 'Revert fields to defaults'. publicationYear is not stored here; new entries always use the current year.
